DP.528.0000:
I wasn’t experienced enough for
the Battle Tower...\f
Training on Stark Mountain seems to
be the only sensible choice ...\f
For some reason, the best Trainers
in Sinnoh seem to gather there.
DP.528.0001:
In a Multi Battle, coordination with
your partner is vital.\f
By working together, one plus one
could become not just two, but even\r
three or four.\f
But one times one is always one.
Do you understand that?
DP.528.0002:
Some say the universe was made by
something born from an Egg...\f
A man I met long ago told me that.
